# Media

File storage, audio streaming, and image handling. Provides the abstraction layer between the rest of the system and physical file I/O.

## Concepts

- **Storage** — `FlysystemStorage` implements `StoragePortInterface`, backed by Flysystem. All file writes go through this.
- **Streaming** — `StreamService` implements `StreamPortInterface`, serves audio track streams. Currently looks up `SongRepositoryInterface` from Catalog directly (layer violation).
- **Images** — `Image` aggregate represents a stored image with BlurHash support. Images attach to albums, artists, and playlists.

The `ImageConverter` and `BlurHashGenerator` handle image processing at upload time.

## Ports

| Port | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `ImagePortInterface` | Image CRUD and retrieval |
| `StoragePortInterface` | File storage (Flysystem) |
| `StreamPortInterface` | Audio stream serving |

## Events

None.

## Interactions

- **Catalog** — `ImageEntity` references `AlbumEntity` and `ArtistEntity`; `StreamService` references `SongRepositoryInterface`
- **Playlist** — `ImageEntity` references `PlaylistEntity`
- **Filesystem** — `StreamController` uses `MimeDetector` for content-type detection
